subcodes.first_line: O thou heavenly father! Thou hast the hosts of the Kingdom and the spiritual
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پدر آسمانی جنود ملکوت داری و ملائکه روحانی ما بیچاره کان مرغ بال و پر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @prayer for spiritual recognition
